---
title: "KMER"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
source("functions.R")
```


```{r}
numReads = 27000000
gridsearchDir = "../output/plotting_data/quality/rna/"
kmerDir = paste0(gridsearchDir, "KMER/")
plotsDir = paste0(gridsearchDir, "plots/")
extType = ".jpg"


```

```{r}

k2Plot = {}

k2Map <- list()

for (k in seq(from = 12, to = 30, by = 5)) {
  kmer <- read_tsv(paste0(kmerDir, "k_", k, ".txt")) %>%
    mutate(geneSetSize = str_count(gene, ","))
  
  leastUniqueKmers = rbind(leastUniqueKmers, kmer %>% arrange(desc(geneSetSize)) %>% head(10) %>% mutate(k = k)) 

  k2Map[[as.character(k)]] <- kmer
}

for(k in seq(from = 12, to = 30, by = 5)){
  kmer = read_tsv(paste0(kmerDir, "k_", k,".txt")) %>% mutate(geneSetSize = str_count(gene, ",")) 
  k2Map[k] = kmer

  p = kmer %>% ggplot(aes(x = geneSetSize)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
  themeForSaving() +
  labs(title = "How many Genes Kmers are mapped to",
       subtitle = paste("K =", k))
  print(p)
  k2Plot[k] = 
}







```

```{r}
tmpKMap = as.data.frame(k2Map[12])

tmpKMap %>% arrange((geneSetSize))
```

```{r}
for (k in names(k2Map)) {
  
  df = k2Map[[k]]
  p = df %>% ggplot(aes(x = geneSetSize)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "log10",
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) +
  themeForSaving() +
  labs(title = "How many Genes Kmers are mapped to",
       subtitle = paste("K =", k))
  print(p)
}



```

```{r}
counts_long <- map_dfr(seq(from = 12, to = 30, by = 2), function(k) {
  read_tsv(paste0(kmerDir, "k_", k, ".txt"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      geneSetSize = str_count(gene, ","),
      k = k
    )
}) %>%
  count(k, geneSetSize) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = k,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-geneSetSize, names_to = "k", values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(k) %>%
  mutate(total_kmers = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

head(counts_long)


p = counts_long %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = geneSetSize, y = count, color = k)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    transform = "log10",
    breaks = 10^(0:6),
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
    ) +
  themeForSaving() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Transcript Mapping per k-mer",
    x = "Number of transcripts a k-mer maps to",
    y = "Number of k-mers"
  )+
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.justification ="center") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1,1000000))

savePlotReport(paste0(gridsearchDir, "kmerdist", extType), p)
```
